mapper.sql: message_id, receiver_id, sender_id, type, target_id, NULL AS target_type, content, is_read, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message ( receiver_id, sender_id, type, target_id, content, is_read ) VALUES ( #{receiverId}, #{senderId}, #{type}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{isRead} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, message_id DESC

SELECT
FROM message
ORDER BY
type is_read created_at
ASC DESC
, message_id DESC LIMIT #{params.pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE receiver_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0
SELECT type, COUNT(*) AS count FROM message WHERE receiver_id = #{userId} AND is_read = 0 GROUP BY type
